feed.title: blank
feed.subtitle: Md Abrar Jahin is an AI Researcher and Multidisciplinary Scientist. His research interests lie at the confluence of efficient deep learning, classical and quantum machine learning, explainable AI (XAI), uncertainty quantification, graph representation learning, physics-informed neural networks (PINN), and reinforcement learning (RL), with applications in high-energy physics, healthcare, and supply chain optimization. His prior work spans Natural Language Processing (NLP), Operations Research, and Comparative Genomics.
